description: Secure a multi-tier application by implementing network isolation using Docker. Create two custom bridge networks named 'frontend' and 'backend'. Deploy a 'web-proxy' container (image: nginx:alpine) connected only to the 'frontend' network with host port 8081 mapped to container port 80. Deploy an 'app-server' container (image: httpd:alpine) connected to both the 'frontend' and 'backend' networks. Deploy a 'data-store' container (image: redis:alpine) connected only to the 'backend' network with host port 6380 mapped to container port 6379. The configuration must ensure 'web-proxy' cannot directly communicate with 'data-store' while 'app-server' maintains communication with both.
